ranks.description: Blazing Barrier Talent 3% of base mana Requires Mage Shields you in flame, absorbing [30 / 100 * Total Health * (1 + Versatility)] damage [ Molten Skin : and reducing Physical damage taken by 0% ] for 1 min. Melee attacks against you cause the attacker to take (14.375% of Spell Power) Fire damage.

Alter Time Talent 1% of base mana Requires Mage Alters the fabric of time, returning you to your current location and health when cast a second time, or after 10 sec. Effect negated by long distance or death.

Ice Block Talent Requires Mage Encases you in a block of ice, protecting you from all attacks and damage for 10 sec, but during that time you cannot attack, move, or cast spells. Causes Hypothermia, preventing you from recasting Ice Block for 30 sec.
Time Walk Talent Requires Mage Alter Time resets the cooldown of Blink and Shimmer when you return to your original location.
Temporal Realignment Talent Requires Mage Upon dropping below 25% health, your past self corrects your timeline, casting Alter Time and instantly returning 50% of your maximum health.
Master of Time Talent Requires Mage Requires level 25 Reduces the cooldown of Alter Time by 5 sec.
Master of Time Talent Requires Mage Requires level 25 Reduces the cooldown of Alter Time by 5 sec.
Winter's Protection Talent Requires Mage The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by 30 sec.
Winter's Protection Talent Requires Mage The cooldown of Ice Block is reduced by 30 sec.
Frost Conditioning Talent Requires Mage Hypothermia's duration is reduced by 10 sec.
Arcane Warding Talent Requires Mage Reduces magic damage taken by 4%.
Arcane Warding Talent Requires Mage Reduces magic damage taken by 4%.
Inspired Intellect Talent Requires Mage Arcane Intellect grants you an additional 2% Intellect.

Mirror Image Talent 2% of base mana Requires Mage Creates 3 copies of you nearby for 15 sec, which cast spells and attack your enemies. While active, you generate significantly reduced threat. Taking direct damage will cause one of your images to dissipate (2s cooldown)

Spellsteal Talent 21% of base mana Requires Mage Steals [ Kleptomania : all beneficial magic effects from the target. These effects lasts a maximum of 2 min / a beneficial magic effect from the target. This effect lasts a maximum of 2 min].
Quick Witted Talent Requires Mage Counterspell's cooldown is reduced by 5 sec.

Dragon's Breath Talent 4% of base mana Requires Mage Enemies in a 12 yd cone in front of you take (66.99% of Spell Power) Fire damage and are disoriented for 4 sec. Damage will cancel the effect. Fire Always deals a critical strike and contributes to Hot Streak.

Supernova Talent Requires Mage Requires level 45 Pulses arcane energy around the target enemy or ally, dealing (34.5% of Spell Power) Arcane damage to all enemies within 8 yds, and knocking them upward. A primary enemy target will take 100% increased damage.
Remove Curse Talent 1.3% of base mana Requires Mage Removes all Curses from a friendly target.
Improved Conjuration Talent Requires Mage Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
Improved Conjuration Talent Requires Mage Mirror Image's cooldown is reduced by 30 sec.
Improved Spellsteal Talent Requires Mage Spellsteal repeats its effect after 4 sec, but it now has a cooldown of 4.0 sec.

Shimmer Talent Replaces Blink 2% of base mana Requires Mage Requires level 25 Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way. Unaffected by the global cooldown and castable while casting.

effects.target_spell_name: Blink 2% of base mana Requires Mage Requires level 25 Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way

replaces_spell.name: Blink 2% of base mana Requires Mage Requires level 25 Teleports you 20 yds forward, unless something is in the way

ranks.description: Improved Blink Talent Requires Mage [ Shimmer / Blink]'s cooldown is reduced by 2 sec.
Improved Counterspell Talent Requires Mage Counterspell prevents casting for an additional 1.0 sec.

Overflowing Energy Talent Requires Mage Arcane Each time your Arcane Barrage fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance. Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes. Fire Each time your Fireball fails to critically strike, it gains 20% increased critical strike chance. Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes. Frost Each time your Frostbolt fails to critically strike, it gains 10% increased critical strike chance. Critical strike bonus is removed when the affected spell critically strikes.
Improved Remove Curse Talent Requires Mage Casting Remove Curse on a friendly target also casts it on yourself, but its cooldown is increased by 20 sec.
Greater Invisibility Talent Requires Mage Makes you invisible and untargetable for 20 sec, removing all threat. Any action taken cancels this effect.
Improved Frost Nova Talent Requires Mage Frost Nova duration is increased by 2 sec.
Ice Ward Talent Requires Mage Requires level 40 Frost Nova now has 2 charges.

Captured Thoughts Talent Requires Mage Frost The duration of Brain Freeze is increased by 15 sec. Arcane The duration of Clearcasting is increased by 10 sec. Fire The duration of Hot Streak is increased by 15 sec.
Tome of Rhonin Talent Requires Mage Increases Critical Strike chance by 2%.
Tome of Antonidas Talent Requires Mage Increases Haste by 2%.
Incantation of Swiftness Talent Requires Mage [ Greater Invisibility : Greater ]Invisibility increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 sec.
Incantation of Swiftness Talent Requires Mage [ Greater Invisibility : Greater ]Invisibility increases your movement speed by 20% for 6 sec.
Master of Escape Talent Requires Mage Reduces the cooldown of Invisibility by 60 sec.
Charm of Aegwynn Talent Requires Mage The critical strike damage of your spells is  increased by 5%.

Brainstorm Talent Requires Mage Frost Gaining Brain Freeze increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap. Arcane Gaining Clearcasting increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap. Fire Gaining Hot Streak increases your Intellect by 1% for 8 sec. Multiple instances may overlap.
Flow of Time Talent Requires Mage The cooldowns of Blink and Shimmer are reduced by 3 sec.
Mana Confluence Talent Requires Mage Your mana costs are reduced by 5%.
Charm of Medivh Talent Requires Mage Your Mastery is increased by 3%.
Permafrost Bauble Talent Requires Mage The cooldown of Ice Block and Ice Cold are reduced by 30 sec.

Freezing Cold Talent Requires Mage Enemies hit by Cone of Cold are frozen in place for 5 sec instead of snared. When your roots expire or are dispelled, your target is snared by 80%, decaying over 3 sec.

Ice Nova Talent Requires Mage Requires level 15 Causes a whirl of icy wind around the enemy, dealing (138% of Spell Power) Frost damage to the target and all other enemies within 8 yds, freezing them in place for 2 sec. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.
Time Manipulation Talent Requires Mage The cooldown of your loss of control spells are reduced by 5 sec.

Ring of Frost Talent 8% of base mana Requires Mage Requires level 40 Summons a Ring of Frost for 10 sec at the target location. Enemies entering the ring are incapacitated for 10 sec. Limit 10 targets. When the incapacitate expires, enemies are slowed by 65% for 4 sec.

Mass Polymorph Talent 4% of base mana Requires Mage Transforms all enemies within 10 yards into sheep, wandering around incapacitated for 15 sec. While affected, the victims cannot take actions but will regenerate health very quickly. Damage will cancel the effect. Only works on Beasts, Humanoids and Critters.
Energized Barriers Talent Requires Mage Casting your barrier removes all snare effects.

Mass Invisibility Talent 6% of base mana Requires Mage You and your allies within 40 yards instantly become invisible for 12 sec. Taking any action will cancel the effect. Does not affect allies in combat.
Barrier Diffusion Talent Requires Mage When your Barrier is removed, reduce its cooldown by 5 sec.
Ice Cold Talent Requires Mage Ice Block now reduces all damage taken by 70% for 6 sec but no longer grants Immunity, prevents movement, attacks, or casting spells. Does not incur the Global Cooldown.
Spatial Manipulation Talent Requires Mage [ Shimmer / Blink] gains an additional charge.

Reflection Talent Requires Mage After casting [ Shimmer / Blink], it is replaced with Reflection for 8 sec. Reflection Teleports you back to where you last [ Shimmer : Shimmered / Blinked]. Castable while casting and unaffected by the global cooldown.
Improved Blazing Barrier Talent Requires Mage Blazing Barrier's damage is increased by 200% and it now cauterizes your wounds, healing you for 15% of the damage it absorbs.
Pyroblast Talent 1.5% of base mana Requires Mage Hurls an immense fiery boulder that causes (555.45% of Spell Power) Fire damage .

Frostfire Bolt Talent 2% of base mana Requires Mage Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing (247% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional (20.6% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage over 8 sec. Frost Applies 1 stack of Freezing.
Fire Blast Talent 1% of base mana Requires Mage Blasts the enemy, critically striking for [(98.625% of Spell Power) * 2] Fire damage. Castable while casting other spells.
Firestarter Talent Requires Mage Requires level 15 Your Fireball and Pyroblast spells always deal a critical strike when the target is above 90% health.

Flamestrike Talent 1.5% of base mana Requires Mage Calls down a pillar of fire, burning all enemies within the area for (300% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. This spell is cast at a selected location. Fire Leaves behind a patch of flames that burns enemies within it for (6 * (15% of Spell Power)) Fire damage over 6 sec.

Flamestrike Talent 1.5% of base mana Requires Mage Calls down a pillar of fire on your target, burning all enemies within the area for (300% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets. This spell is cast at your target. Fire Leaves behind a patch of flames that burns enemies within it for (6 * (15% of Spell Power)) Fire damage over 6 sec.
Imbued Warding Talent Requires Mage Fire Blazing Barrier also casts an Ice Barrier at 25% effectiveness. Frost Ice Barrier also casts a Blazing Barrier at 25% effectiveness.

Meltdown Talent Requires Mage You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time. Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.

Frostfire Empowerment Talent Requires Mage Fire Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Frost Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Damage from Frostfire Empowerment applies 1 stack of Freezing.
Elemental Affinity Talent Requires Mage Frost The cooldown of Fire spells is reduced by 30%. Fire The cooldown of Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes is reduced by 30%.

Flame and Frost Talent Requires Mage Fire Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes when it activates. Frost Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells

Duality Talent Requires Mage Frost Casting Glacial Spike also casts a Pyroblast, dealing (705% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Fire Casting Pyroblast has a 20% chance to also cast a Glacial Spike, dealing (366.24% of Spell Power) Frost damage.
Ignition Talent Requires Mage Fire Blast now spreads 50% of your target's Ignite to 1 enemy. Flamestrike applies 15% more Ignite.

Combustion Talent 10% of base mana Requires Mage Engulfs you in flames for 10 sec, increasing your spells' critical strike chance by 100%. [ Additionally, increases your spell damage by 0%.] Castable while casting other spells. Fire Additionally, increases your Mastery by 75% of your critical strike chance.

Fuel the Fire Talent Requires Mage Flamestrike has a chance equal to 100% of your spell critical strike chance to build up to a Hot Streak. Flamestrike deals 5% increased damage for each enemy it damages, up to 25%.
Heat Sink Talent Requires Mage Fire Fire Blast now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 15%. Frost Flurry now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 10%.
Thermal Conditioning Talent Requires Mage Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by 10%.
Severe Temperatures Talent Requires Mage Frostfire Empowerment stacks 1 additional time and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional 20% of its damage.

Dualcasting Adept Talent Requires Mage Frost Your Fire spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage. Shatter damage increased by 15%. Blizzard damage increased by 15%. Fire Your Frost spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage. Pyroblast damage increased by 15%. Flamestrike damage increased by 10%.

Molten Chill Talent Requires Mage Fire Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite at 10% increased effectiveness. Frost Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite, dealing an additional 30% of their damage over 9 sec.
Fervent Flickering Talent Requires Mage Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its damage is increased by 25%.

effects.target_spell_name: Fervent Flickering Talent Requires Mage Fire Blast

ranks.description: Cauterize Talent Requires Mage Fatal damage instead brings you to 35% health and then burns you for 28% of your maximum health over 6 sec. While burning, movement slowing effects are suppressed and your movement speed is increased by 150%. This effect cannot occur more than once every 6 min.

Meteor Talent 1% of base mana Requires Mage Requires level 50 Calls down a meteor which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (900% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies, and burns the ground, dealing [8 * (52% of Spell Power)] Fire damage over 4 sec to all enemies in the area. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Frostfire Infusion Talent Requires Mage Frost Frostfire Bolt has an additional 5% chance to grant Brain Freeze. The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%. Fire Frostfire Bolt's critical strike chance is increased by 15%.. The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.

Flash Freezeburn Talent Requires Mage Frost Glacial Spike damage increased by 15% and it now explodes on impact, dealing 25% of its damage to up to 5 nearby enemies. Additionally, Glacial Spike now grants Frostfire Empowerment. Fire Meteor's damage is increased by 25%. Meteor now grants Frostfire Empowerment.
Blast Radius Talent Requires Mage Frost Comet Storm damage increased by 20%. Meteor damage increased by 20%. Fire Meteor damage increased by 20%. Comet Storm damage increased by 20%.
Elemental Conduit Talent Requires Mage Fire Comet Storm and Glacial Spike now apply Ignite. Your Haste is increased by 2%. Frost Meteor and Pyroblast now apply Ignite. Your Haste is increased by 2%.

Scorch Talent 1% of base mana Requires Mage Scorches an enemy for (100% of Spell Power) Fire damage. When cast on a target below 30% health, Scorch is a guaranteed critical strike. Castable while moving.
Flame On Talent Requires Mage Requires level 35 Fire Blast gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 2.0 sec.

effects.target_spell_name: Flame On Talent Requires Mage Requires level 35 Fire Blast

ranks.description: Kindling Talent Requires Mage Combustion's cooldown is reduced by 60 sec.
Critical Mass Talent Requires Mage Your spells have a 4% increased chance to deal a critical strike. You gain 10% more of the Critical Strike stat from all sources.
Critical Mass Talent Requires Mage Your spells have a 4% increased chance to deal a critical strike. You gain 10% more of the Critical Strike stat from all sources.
Deep Impact Talent Requires Mage The enemy closest to the center of Meteor's impact takes 75% increased damage.

Isothermic Core Talent Requires Mage Frost Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing (900% of Spell Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets. Damage from Meteor Shatters 1 stacks of Freezing. Fire Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing [(92.8% of Spell Power) * 7] Frost damage to nearby enemies.

Heat Shimmer Talent Requires Mage Approximately 3 procs per minute While Combustion is not active, damage from Ignite has a small chance to make your next Scorch instant, deal 100% increased damage, and deal damage as though your target was below 30% health.

Scald Talent Requires Mage Fireball always critically strikes enemies below 30% health. When Fireball or Scorch damage an enemy below 30% health, Fireball deals 25% increased damage and Scorch deals 250% increased damage.
Controlled Destruction Talent Requires Mage Damaging an enemy with Fireball, Pyroblast, or Flamestrike increases the damage it receives from Ignite by 0.2%. Stacks up to 50 times.
Mote of Flame Talent Requires Mage All Fire damage dealt increased by 3%.
Blast Zone Talent Requires Mage Meteor's cooldown is reduced by 15 sec.

Spellfire Spheres Talent Requires Mage Arcane Casting a damaging spell has a 12% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere. While you're out of combat, you will slowly conjure Spellfire Spheres over time. Spellfire Sphere Increases your spell damage by 1.0%. Stacks up to 3 times. Fire Consuming Hot Streak has a 25% chance to conjure a Spellfire Sphere. While you're out of combat, you will slowly conjure Spellfire Spheres over time. Spellfire Sphere Increases your spell damage by 1.0%. Stacks up to 3 times.
Conflagration Talent Requires Mage Fire Blast deals (40% of Spell Power) additional Fire damage to up to 8 nearby enemies.
Intensifying Flame Talent Requires Mage While Ignite is on 3 or fewer enemies it flares up dealing an additional 30% of its damage to affected targets.
Spontaneous Combustion Talent Requires Mage Casting Combustion refreshes up to 1 charge of Fire Blast.
Spontaneous Combustion Talent Requires Mage Casting Combustion refreshes up to 1 charge of Fire Blast.
Molten Fury Talent Requires Mage Damage dealt to targets below 30% health is increased by 15%.
Inflame Talent Requires Mage Hot Streak increases the amount of Ignite damage from Pyroblast or Flamestrike by an additional 25%.

Mana Cascade Talent Requires Mage Arcane Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Barrage grants you 0.5% Haste for 10 sec. Stacks up to 10 times. Multiple instances may overlap. Fire Consuming Hot Streak grants you 0.5% Haste for 10 sec. Stacks up to 10 times. Multiple instances may overlap.

Invocation: Arcane Phoenix Talent Requires Mage Arcane When you cast Arcane Surge, summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.   Arcane Phoenix Your Arcane Phoenix aids you for the duration of your Arcane Surge, casting random Arcane and Fire spells. Fire When you cast Combustion, summon an Arcane Phoenix to aid you in battle.   Arcane Phoenix Your Arcane Phoenix aids you for the duration of your Combustion, casting random Arcane and Fire spells.
Burden of Power Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Blast damage increased by 5%. Arcane Pulse damage increased by 5%. Fire Pyroblast damage increased by 3%. Flamestrike damage increased by 3%.

Glorious Incandescence Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Barrage summons 1 Meteor for every 6 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed. Meteorite Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (102% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets. Fire Generating a Spellfire Sphere causes your next cast of Fire Blast to call down a storm of 4 Meteorites on its target. Meteorite Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (102% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets.
Wildfire Talent Requires Mage Fire Blast damage increased by 10% and it now spreads Ignite to 1 additional target.
Wildfire Talent Requires Mage Fire Blast damage increased by 10% and it now spreads Ignite to 1 additional target.
Fevered Incantation Talent Requires Mage Each consecutive critical strike you deal increases critical strike damage you deal by 1%, up to 4% for 6 sec.
Fevered Incantation Talent Requires Mage Each consecutive critical strike you deal increases critical strike damage you deal by 1%, up to 4% for 6 sec.
Fire's Ire Talent Requires Mage Your spell critical strike chance is increased by 2.5%. Combustion increases your critical strike damage by 2.5%.
Fire's Ire Talent Requires Mage Your spell critical strike chance is increased by 2.5%. Combustion increases your critical strike damage by 2.5%.

Merely a Setback Talent Requires Mage Arcane The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional 8 sec after your Barrier is removed. Fire The bonuses provided by your Barrier spells persist an additional 8 sec after your Barrier is removed. Additionally, Cauterize no longer deals damage to you.
Time Twist Talent Requires Mage The cooldown of Alter Time is reduced by 10 sec.

Codex of the Sunstriders Talent Requires Mage Arcane When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres. Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during Arcane Surge by 1% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration. Fire When your Arcane Phoenix is summoned, it consumes all your Spellfire Spheres. Each Sphere consumed increases your spell damage during Combustion by 2% and causes your Arcane Phoenix to cast an exceptional Arcane or Fire spell over its duration.
Lessons in Debilitation Talent Requires Mage Your Arcane Phoenix has picked up a few tricks, and will Spellsteal when it is summoned and when it expires.

Explosive Potential Talent Requires Mage Arcane After casting Arcane Surge, your next Blink will cause a Blast Wave at your previous location, dealing (54.3375% of Spell Power) Fire damage, knocking enemies back 8 yds, and slowing them by 70% for 6 sec. Fire After casting Combustion, your next Blink will cause a Blast Wave at your previous location, dealing (54.3375% of Spell Power) Fire damage, knocking enemies back 8 yds, and slowing them by 70% for 6 sec.

Pyrocosm Talent Requires Mage Fire Damage from Fireball has a 20% chance to summon a Meteorite. When a Meteorite lands, the cooldown of Fire Blast is reduced by 0.5 sec. Arcane Each wave of Arcane Missiles has a 10% chance to summon a Meteorite. When a Meteorite lands, you have a 5% chance to gain Clearcasting.
Master of Flame Talent Requires Mage Ignite deals 15% more damage when Combustion is not active. Fire Blast now spreads an additional 50% of your Ignite.
From the Ashes Talent Requires Mage Requires level 35 Fire Blast damage increased by 15%. Your direct damage spells reduce the cooldown of Fire Blast by 0.50 sec. (100ms cooldown)
Fiery Rush Talent Requires Mage While Combustion is active, Fire Blast recharges 50% faster.
Flame Accelerant Talent Requires Mage The cast time of Pyroblast and Flamestrike is reduced by 20%.

Pyromaniac Talent Requires Mage Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike while Hot Streak is active has a 6% chance to repeat the spell cast at 50% effectiveness. This effect counts as consuming Hot Streak. (700ms cooldown)

Savor the Moment Talent Requires Mage Arcane When you cast Arcane Surge, its duration is extended by 0.4 sec for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to 2.0 sec. Fire When you cast Combustion, its duration is extended by 0.4 sec for each Spellfire Sphere you have, up to 2.0 sec.

Sunfury Execution Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Barrage deals 5% increased damage to enemies affected by your Touch of the Magi. Fire Pyroclasm's damage bonus is increased by 20% and Meteor grants Pyroclasm if talented.
Ashes of Inspiration Talent Requires Mage When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it grants you Lesser Time Warp for 6 sec. Lesser Time Warp Warp the flow of time, increasing your haste by 15%.
Rondurmancy Talent Requires Mage Spellfire Spheres can now stack up to 5 times.

Spellfire Salvo Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Salvo can stack 5 additional times. Meteorite damage increased by 15%. Fire Fire Blast cooldown reduced by 1.0 sec. Meteorite damage increased by 15%.
Burnout Talent Requires Mage When Combustion expires, all of your active Ignites explode, dealing 75% of their remaining damage.
Feel the Burn Talent Requires Mage Fire Blast increases your mastery by 2% for 4 sec. Multiple applications may overlap. (100ms cooldown)
Slow Burn Talent Requires Mage Combustion grants mastery equal to 75% of your Critical Strike stat. Combustion causes your spells to apply Ignite at 15% increased effectiveness.
Burn It All Talent Requires Mage Combustion grants you 10% increased spell damage plus an additional 20% of your critical strike chance as spell damage.

Pyroclasm Talent Requires Mage Requires level 50 Consuming Hot Streak has a 15% chance to make your next non-instant Pyroblast or Flamestrike cast within 15 sec deal 230% additional damage. Maximum 2 stacks.

Cinderstorm Talent Requires Mage Casting Pyroblast or Flamestrike has a 8% chance to summon a storm of 5 cinders that pursue your target. Upon reaching your target, each cinder deals (200% of Spell Power) Fire damage, applies Ignite at 100% effectiveness, and spreads 50% of your Ignite to up to 1 nearby target.

Memory of Al'ar Talent Requires Mage Arcane During Arcane Surge, you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade. When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting Arcane Soul for 4.0 sec. Arcane Soul : Arcane Barrage grants Clearcasting and generates 4 Arcane Charges. Each cast of Arcane Barrage grants 5 stacks of Arcane Salvo and casting Arcane Barrage does not consume Arcane Salvo. Fire During Combustion, you gain twice as many stacks of Mana Cascade. When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it empowers you, granting Hyperthermia for 4.0 sec. Hyperthermia : Pyroblast and Flamestrike have no cast time, are guaranteed to critically strike, and increase the damage of Pyroblast and Flamestrike by 15%.
Fired Up Talent Requires Mage Consuming Hot Streak has a 20% chance to grant you a stack of Fired Up, increasing your Fire damage by 4% for 12 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.
Ashes of Inspiration Talent Requires Mage When your Arcane Phoenix expires, it grants you Lesser Time Warp for 6 sec. Lesser Time Warp Warp the flow of time, increasing your haste by 15%.
Burden of Power Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Blast damage increased by 5%. Arcane Pulse damage increased by 5%. Fire Pyroblast damage increased by 3%. Flamestrike damage increased by 3%.

Hyperthermia : Pyroblast and Flamestrike have no cast time, are guaranteed to critically strike, and increase the damage of Pyroblast and Flamestrike by 15%.

Glorious Incandescence Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Barrage summons 1 Meteor for every 6 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed. Meteorite Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (102% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets. Fire Generating a Spellfire Sphere causes your next cast of Fire Blast to call down a storm of 4 Meteorites on its target. Meteorite Calls down a meteorite which lands at the target location after 3 sec, dealing (102% of Spell Power) Fire damage to all enemies hit, reduced beyond 8 targets.

Splinterstorm Talent Requires Mage Arcane Casting Arcane Surge generates 8 Arcane Splinters. During Arcane Surge, your chance to conjure an additional Arcane Splinter is increased to 100%. Frost Each time Ray of Frost damages one or more enemies, it generates 1 Frost Splinter. For 10 sec after casting Ray of Frost, your chance to conjure an additional Frost Splinter is increased to 100%.

Spellfrost Teachings Talent Requires Mage Arcane Direct damage from Arcane Splinters reduces the cooldown of Arcane Orb by 0.25 sec. Frost Direct damage from Frost Splinters reduces the cooldown of Frozen Orb by 0.25 sec.

Controlled Instincts Talent Requires Mage Arcane 40% of the direct damage dealt by an Arcane Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Frost 60% of the direct damage dealt by a Frost Splinter is also dealt to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Signature Spell Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Blast and Arcane Pulse damage increased by 15%. Casting Touch of the Magi conjures 4 Arcane Splinters. Frost Frostbolt and Blizzard damage increased by 25%. Glacial Spike conjures 2 additional Frost Splinters.

Archmage's Wrath Talent Requires Mage Arcane Arcane Surge damage increased by 30%. Your chance to gain Clearcasting is increased by 3%. Frost Ray of Frost damage increased by 20%. Your chance to gain Brain Freeze from Frostbolt is increased by 5%.
Slippery Slinging Talent Requires Mage You have 40% increased movement speed during Alter Time .
Look Again Talent Requires Mage While in combat, Blink summons a Mirror Image at your previous location.

Reactive Barrier Talent Requires Mage Frost Your Ice Barrier can absorb up to 25% more damage based on your missing Health. Max effectiveness when under 25% health. Arcane Your Prismatic Barrier can absorb up to 25% more damage based on your missing Health. Max effectiveness when under 25% health.
Phantasmal Image Talent Requires Mage Your Mirror Image summons 1 extra clone.

Splintering Orbs Talent Requires Mage Arcane Enemies damaged by your Arcane Orb conjure 2 Arcane Splinters, up to 4. Arcane Orb damage is increased by 10%. Frost Enemies damaged by your Frozen Orb conjure 1 Frost Splinter, up to 4. Frozen Orb damage is increased by 40%.

Augury Abounds Talent Requires Mage Arcane Conjuring one or more Arcane Splinters has a 10% chance to conjure a burst of 8 Arcane Splinters. Frost Conjuring one or more Frost Splinters has a 10% chance to conjure a burst of 8 Frost Splinters. (500ms cooldown)

Force of Will Talent Requires Mage Arcane Casting Arcane Barrage conjures an Arcane Splinter for every 5 Arcane Salvo stacks consumed. Frost Ice Lance conjures a Frost Splinter for every 2 Freezing stacks Shattered from its primary target.

Splintering Sorcery Talent Requires Mage Arcane Casting Arcane Blast or Arcane Pulse conjures an Arcane Splinter. Arcane Splinter : Conjure raw Arcane magic into a sharp projectile that deals (43.65% of Spell Power) Arcane damage. Frost Casting Frostbolt or Flurry conjures a Frost Splinter. Frost Splinter : Conjure raw Frost magic into a sharp projectile that deals (45.3% of Spell Power) Frost damage.

Polished Focus Talent Requires Mage Arcane Casting Arcane Barrage while at 20 or more Arcane Salvo stacks refunds 5 Arcane Salvo stacks. Arcane Barrage damage increased by 15%. Frost Ice Lance Shatters 1 additional stack of Freezing. Shatter damage increased by 20%.

Infused Splinters Talent Requires Mage Arcane Direct damage from Arcane Splinters have a 25% chance to grant 1 stack Arcane Salvo. Arcane Salvo Increases the damage of your next Arcane Barrage by 3%. Frost Direct damage from Frost Splinters have a 15% chance to apply 1 stack of Freezing.

Attuned Familiar Talent Requires Mage Arcane Your Arcane Familiar has a 50% chance to conjure a Splinter alongside its Arcane Assault. Frost Your Water Elemental has a 50% chance to conjure a Splinter alongside its Waterbolt.
Shifting Shards Talent Requires Mage Frost Gaining Brain Freeze conjures 2 Frost Splinters. Arcane Gaining Clearcasting conjures 2 Arcane Splinters.

Flash Freezeburn Talent Requires Mage Frost Glacial Spike damage increased by 15% and it now explodes on impact, dealing 25% of its damage to up to 5 nearby enemies. Additionally, Glacial Spike now grants Frostfire Empowerment. Fire Meteor's damage is increased by 25%. Meteor now grants Frostfire Empowerment.
Elemental Affinity Talent Requires Mage Frost The cooldown of Fire spells is reduced by 30%. Fire The cooldown of Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes is reduced by 30%.

Flame and Frost Talent Requires Mage Fire Cauterize resets the cooldown of your Frost spells with a base cooldown shorter than 4 minutes when it activates. Frost Ice Block and Ice Cold reset the cooldowns of your Fire spells

Dualcasting Adept Talent Requires Mage Frost Your Fire spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage. Shatter damage increased by 15%. Blizzard damage increased by 15%. Fire Your Frost spells deal 20% increased critical strike damage. Pyroblast damage increased by 15%. Flamestrike damage increased by 10%.

Isothermic Core Talent Requires Mage Frost Comet Storm now also calls down a Meteor, dealing (900% of Spell Power) Fire damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets. Damage from Meteor Shatters 1 stacks of Freezing. Fire Meteor now also calls down a Comet Storm, dealing [(92.8% of Spell Power) * 7] Frost damage to nearby enemies.

Frostfire Bolt Talent 2% of base mana Requires Mage Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing (247% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional (20.6% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage over 8 sec. Frost Applies 1 stack of Freezing.
Blast Radius Talent Requires Mage Frost Comet Storm damage increased by 20%. Meteor damage increased by 20%. Fire Meteor damage increased by 20%. Comet Storm damage increased by 20%.
Heat Sink Talent Requires Mage Fire Fire Blast now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 15%. Frost Flurry now deals Frostfire damage and its damage is increased by 10%.

Frostfire Infusion Talent Requires Mage Frost Frostfire Bolt has an additional 5% chance to grant Brain Freeze. The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%. Fire Frostfire Bolt's critical strike chance is increased by 15%.. The damage of your Frost spells and Fire spells are increased by 4%.
Thermal Conditioning Talent Requires Mage Frostfire Bolt's cast time is reduced by 10%.
Severe Temperatures Talent Requires Mage Frostfire Empowerment stacks 1 additional time and it causes Frostfire Bolt to explode for an additional 20% of its damage.

Frostfire Empowerment Talent Requires Mage Fire Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Frost Casting Frostfire spells has a 10% chance to activate Frostfire Empowerment, causing your next Frostfire Bolt to be instant cast, deal 60% increased damage, explode for 60% of its damage to nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets. Damage from Frostfire Empowerment applies 1 stack of Freezing.
Imbued Warding Talent Requires Mage Fire Blazing Barrier also casts an Ice Barrier at 25% effectiveness. Frost Ice Barrier also casts a Blazing Barrier at 25% effectiveness.

Meltdown Talent Requires Mage You melt slightly out of your Ice Block and Ice Cold, allowing you to move slowly during Ice Block and increasing your movement speed over time. Ice Block and Ice Cold trigger a Blazing Barrier when they end.
Elemental Conduit Talent Requires Mage Fire Comet Storm and Glacial Spike now apply Ignite. Your Haste is increased by 2%. Frost Meteor and Pyroblast now apply Ignite. Your Haste is increased by 2%.

Molten Chill Talent Requires Mage Fire Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite at 10% increased effectiveness. Frost Your Frostfire spells apply Ignite, dealing an additional 30% of their damage over 9 sec.

Duality Talent Requires Mage Frost Casting Glacial Spike also casts a Pyroblast, dealing (705% of Spell Power) Fire damage. Fire Casting Pyroblast has a 20% chance to also cast a Glacial Spike, dealing (366.24% of Spell Power) Frost damage.

Frostfire Bolt Talent 2% of base mana Requires Mage Launches a bolt of frostfire at the enemy, causing (247% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage, slowing movement speed by 50%, and causing an additional (20.6% of Spell Power) Frostfire damage over 8 sec. Frost Applies 1 stack of Freezing.
